title: AssetCrosswalk
description: A cluster of utility_asset records (across HIFLD / EIA / OSM / Spiderweb sources) that refer to the same real-world facility. Non-destructive: raw utility_assets.jsonl keeps every source row; this layer records the equivalence + a best-evidence canonical so downstream consumers can collapse duplicates without losing provenance.

canonical_asset_id.description: Best-evidence member (lowest tier, prefers coords, source HIFLD>EIA>Spiderweb>OSM).

max_distance_m.description: Largest pairwise distance (m) among geolocated members; null if matched only by plant_code with a coordless member.
